title: Voronoi — Town Slice
description: Voronoi district/town generation: LLM picks region size + district count; deterministic engine computes Voronoi cells, roads, and buildings.

prompts.prompt: Build a small village with 4 districts. Use a 60x60 metre region.
Generate a medium town with 6 districts. Use an 80x80 metre region and 4m tile size.
Build a small city with 10 districts in a 100x100 metre region.
Create an industrial park with 5 districts in a 100x80 metre region.
